title: ET Money overview
text: ET Money is ET's personal finance and investing app. It is framed around goal-based, suitability-led guided investing and presents investing data in a simplified way so users can separate signals from noise.

title: ET Money scale
text: ET Money publicly highlights 1.2 crore registered users, Rs 25,000 crore money under management, and 50 lakh-plus monthly SIPs registered as part of its scale and trust narrative.

title: ET Money investor personality
text: ET Money includes an investor personality assessment and positions it as a way to bring a user's personality and suitability into investing decisions.

title: ET Money product breadth
text: ET Money's help center covers mutual funds, NPS, Genius, fixed deposit, cash, bonds, guaranteed returns, insurance, smallcase, earnings, and general account workflows. The app spans much more than a single investment product.

title: ET Money mutual funds and SIP
text: ET Money supports mutual fund investing and repeatedly emphasizes SIP as a simple, accessible, beginner-friendly way to build long-term wealth with disciplined investing.

title: ET Money portfolio tracking
text: ET Money's mutual-fund surface explicitly says users can track an existing portfolio, get report cards, and access capital-gains reporting.

title: ET Money learn hub
text: ET Money also functions as a financial-learning and tools platform. Its Learn section spans financial planning, stock market, retirement, loans, NPS, insurance, fixed deposit, income tax, and personal finance.

title: ET Money fixed deposits
text: ET Money offers fixed-deposit discovery and booking, with rate comparison, provider comparison, FD calculators, and different FD types such as cumulative FD, insured FD, and FDs with SIP-style contributions.

title: ET Rise overview
text: ET Rise / ET SME is ET's lane for entrepreneurship and MSMEs. The content emphasizes benchmarking, small-business management, operational improvement, and growth opportunities for small and medium businesses.

title: ET Rise practical content
text: ET Rise list pages include practical small-business topics such as benchmarking, MSME registration, ICT investments, profitability, export difficulty, and policy impact on MSMEs.

title: ET Rise awards
text: ET Rise Top MSMEs Ranking Awards recognize high-performing MSMEs across categories like innovation, exports, growth, and overall performance.

title: ET SME regional summits
text: ET SME / ET Make in India regional summits are positioned as on-ground knowledge-sharing and networking platforms that bring MSMEs, associations, policymakers, and enablers together.

title: When to recommend ET Rise
text: If a user asks about SMEs, entrepreneurship, MSME growth, regional business summits, or small-business guidance, ET Rise / SME should be the primary lane, not ET Prime.

title: Brand Equity overview
text: ET Brand Equity is ET's dedicated marketing and advertising vertical. Its home surface includes marketing, media, the people report, advertising, business of brands, research, digital, and pitch-report style coverage.

title: Brand Equity audience
text: Brand Equity is a much better fit than ET Prime when the user is a marketer, brand manager, agency professional, media buyer, martech professional, or CMO-type reader.

title: Brand Equity format surfaces
text: ET Brand Equity offers news, exclusives, leaders speak, events, awards, webinars, newsletters, and an app. It is not just a news feed; it is a vertical ecosystem for marketing/media professionals.

title: Brand Equity content examples
text: Brand Equity frequently covers sponsorships, influencer marketing, digital platforms, campaign work, media regulation, and the business of brands, which makes it a distinct lane from finance-first ET products.

title: ETGovernment overview
text: ETGovernment is ET's governance and public-sector vertical. It organizes coverage around MeitY, opinion, cybersecurity, states, people movement, Digital India, GovTech, smart infrastructure, PSU, and policy.

title: ETGovernment audience
text: ETGovernment should be recommended for policy watchers, public-sector professionals, GovTech readers, PSU stakeholders, and users who want governance or infrastructure coverage instead of premium business commentary.

title: ETGovernment ecosystem features
text: ETGovernment includes news, exclusives, leaders speak, events, awards, webinars, newsletters, and an app, so it can power both content discovery and event/community discovery.

title: ETGovernment initiative
text: The ETGovernment Public Sector Leadership Series is an interview-driven initiative focusing on collaboration between government/public-sector systems and industry technologies.

title: ET Now overview
text: ET Now is ET's live or video-first business-news surface with streaming pages and latest video feeds. It is the right lane when the user wants to watch coverage rather than only read articles.

title: ET Now latest videos
text: The ET Now feed surfaces latest videos that mix business explainers, policy segments, interviews, and big-news clips.

title: ET Now budget coverage
text: ET Now has dedicated major-event coverage such as full Budget-day analysis with expert panels and live decoding of policy announcements.

title: ET Now shows example
text: ET Titan Talks is an interview-style ET Now video property that features business leaders discussing strategy, growth, policy, and leadership.

title: ET Now event coverage
text: ET Now also shows summit-style coverage such as Global Business Summit sessions and excerpts.

title: ET TravelWorld overview
text: ET TravelWorld is ET's travel and hospitality industry vertical. It covers travel-sector news, destination stories, leaders speak, events, awards, webinars, and an app/newsletter surface.

title: ET TravelWorld industry angle
text: TravelWorld is better treated as an industry vertical than as a leisure lifestyle page. It covers airlines, tourism, hospitality expansion, infrastructure, destinations, and sector updates.

title: ET TravelWorld audience
text: Recommend ET TravelWorld when the user wants travel-sector business updates, tourism policy, hospitality trends, or travel-industry events—not when they want generic world news or ET Prime.

title: ET Panache overview
text: ET Panache is ET's lifestyle and worklife lane. It spans entertainment, tech, cars and bikes, health, worklife, web stories, slideshows, and videos.

title: ET Panache format style
text: Panache is more lifestyle-forward and popular-format than most ET business verticals. It mixes quick reads, web stories, slideshows, videos, celebrity and worklife content.

title: ET Panache audience
text: Recommend Panache for lifestyle, worklife, entertainment, popular culture, or aspirational reading intent. Do not collapse that into ET Prime.

title: ET world-news overview
text: ET has a dedicated International / World News lane for current world affairs, geopolitics, international updates, and global economic developments.

title: No profiling for world affairs
text: If the user asks for current world affairs, global news, or international bullet points, the system should answer directly from the news lane or the latest ET world feed. It should not begin a multi-turn profiling interview.

title: World-news answer style
text: For world-news or current-affairs prompts, prefer bullet-point summaries, category groupings, or topic-based summaries over concierge-style lane interviews.

title: Non-Prime heavy routing
text: When a user mentions ET Money, ET Rise, ETGovernment, ET Brand Equity, ET Now, ET TravelWorld, ET Panache, or world news, those lanes should outrank ET Prime and ET Markets unless the user explicitly asks for Prime/Markets or broad entry-point advice.

title: Profile only when useful
text: If the user asks for direct information, lists, bullet points, current affairs, or a specific ET vertical, answer directly first. Ask follow-up questions only if they clearly improve the recommendation or comparison.

title: Natural question mode
text: The assistant must support natural questions beyond product discovery. It should switch between concierge mode and information mode depending on the query, not force every conversation into profile discovery.
